summary: By default or with a setting of 'false', successive application of incremental derating using the -increment option (or deprecated -incremental_adjust option) will overwrite any existing derate value with the new value. When this global is set to 'true', successive application of the derates will be accumulated into a final derate value.
description: By default or with a setting of 'false', successive application of incremental derating using the -increment option (or deprecated -incremental_adjust option) will overwrite any existing derate value with the new value. When this global is set to 'true', successive application of the derates will be accumulated into a final derate value.
